title: Food Security, Agriculture, and Economic Growth: Opportunities for Cooperation between the United States and Sub-Saharan Africa
summary: Testimony of Calestous Juma before the House Committee on Foreign Affairs, Subcommittee on Africa and Global Health, Hearing on Food Security in Africa: The Impact of Agricultural Development
body: House Committee on Foreign Affairs, Subcommittee on Africa and Global Health, Hearing on Food Security in Africa: The Impact of Agricultural Development Testimony of Calestous Juma before the House Committee on Foreign Affairs, Subcommittee on Africa and Global Health, Hearing on Food Security in Africa: The Impact of Agricultural Development The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Juma, Calestous. “Food Security, Agriculture, and Economic Growth: Opportunities for Cooperation between the United States and Sub-Saharan Africa.” July 18, 2007 Copy to Clipboard Food Security, Agriculture, and Economic Growth: Opportunities for Cooperation between the United States and Sub-Saharan Africa View Citation Print Africa Biotechnology Economic Policy Globalization Governance Higher Education Policy Infrastructure Technology International development North America Science & Technology Science & Technology Policy Science, Technology, and Globalization Science, Technology, and Public Policy Sustainable Development Trade Recommended citation Juma, Calestous. “Food Security, Agriculture, and Economic Growth: Opportunities for Cooperation between the United States and Sub-Saharan Africa.” July 18, 2007 Copy to Clipboard Author Calestous Juma More From This Expert Royal Society Biographical Memoir - Calestous Juma Exponential Innovation and Human Rights Up Next Photo Credit Toggle Document Journal Article The Israeli military and tech industry collaborate on user-friendly software tools that automate war and occupation Oct. 30, 2024 by Sophia Goodfriend From Middle East Initiative Reports & Papers From the Frontlines to the Future: Assessing Emerging Technology in Russia's Invasion Strategy and NATO's Next Moves Dec. 20, 2023 by Grace Jones, Armughan Syed and Sydney Hansen Article Lessons for Today's Cold War 2.0 with Russia, China Aug. 8, 2023 by Christina Pazzanese
